title: Every event in a baseline run carries source='avp://agent'
description: Source-field discipline. The agent is the sole producer on the wire (spec §8 conformance #1), so every event in the trajectory MUST be tagged source='avp://agent'. No event MAY be missing the source field, and no event MAY be tagged source='avp://supervisor' (supervisor attribution lives in run_requested.data, not in the envelope).

forbidden_events.label: no event may carry source=avp://supervisor (agent is sole producer)
